candidate_definition_hints.text: Machine-readable references of terms defined in web browser specifications

This repository contains **machine-readable references of CSS properties, definitions, IDL, and other useful terms that can be automatically extracted from web browser specifications** (see a [list of projects known to use the data](#known-consumers)). The contents of the reposi…
